name: Gum Drop Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 pound gum drops (remove black licorice drops)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease well and flour a Bundt pan or 2 (9 inch) loaf pans.
3. Cream together shortening and sugar until smooth.
4. Blend in eggs and applesauce, mixing until well combined.
5. Gradually blend the dry ingredients into the mixture.
6. Gently fold in nuts and crushed gum drops.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan(s).
8. Bake at 325°F for about 2 hours or until a pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool slightly, then remove the cake from the pan and place it on a rack to cool completely.
